name: Mercedes
title: Queen of Elves
backstory: Mercedes is the queen of the elves who ruled over Elluel with grace and power. She wielded dual bowguns in the battle against the Black Mage, but was cursed along with her people and frozen in ice for centuries. After awakening, she fights to restore her kingdom and protect Maple World from the returning darkness.

name: Aran
title: Legendary Warrior of the Polearm
backstory: Aran was the mightiest warrior among the six heroes who fought the Black Mage in ancient times. During the final battle, the Black Mage's curse erased all of Aran's memories and froze the hero on Rien Island. Rediscovered by Lilin, Aran must relearn combat skills while recovering lost memories to face the Black Mage once more.

name: Evan
title: Dragon Master
backstory: Evan is a young farmboy from Henesys who inherited the spirit pact of Freud, the original Dragon Master and one of the six heroes. He discovered the dragon Mir as a hatchling and formed a bond that echoes the ancient contract between Freud and the Onyx Dragon Afrien. Together with Mir, Evan carries on the legacy of the Dragon Master to defend Maple World.

name: Luminous
title: Mage of Light and Darkness
backstory: Luminous was the most powerful light mage among the six heroes who sealed the Black Mage. In the final moment of the sealing, the Black Mage forced a fragment of his dark power into Luminous, creating a constant internal struggle between light and darkness. He now battles to control both powers while seeking to permanently end the Black Mage's influence.

name: Phantom
title: Master Thief
backstory: Phantom is a legendary gentleman thief who joined the heroes after the Black Mage murdered Empress Aria, the woman he secretly loved. Driven by vengeance and a sense of justice hidden behind flamboyant charm, he can steal and replicate the skills of other adventurers. He commands the flying fortress Lumiere and fights in Aria's memory.

name: Shade
title: The Forgotten Hero
backstory: Shade, originally known as Eunwol, was the sixth hero who sacrificed his very existence to seal the Black Mage. The sealing required a life as its price, and Shade offered himself, causing everyone to forget he ever existed. He returned to a world where no one remembers him, fighting alongside spirits as the loneliest hero.

name: Hilla
title: Shamaness of Azwan
backstory: Hilla was once a shamaness of the ancient kingdom of Azwan who turned to the Black Mage in exchange for eternal youth and necromantic power. She betrayed and destroyed her own kingdom, raising its people as an undead army. As one of the Black Mage's most loyal commanders, she schemes to expand her dark dominion across Maple World.

name: Magnus
title: Tyrant of Heliseum
backstory: Magnus is a powerful Nova warrior who betrayed his own people in the world of Grandis to serve the Black Mage. He conquered the great city of Heliseum, the capital of the Nova, and rules it as a tyrant with an iron fist. His immense strength and command over dark energy make him one of the most feared commanders.

name: Arkarium
title: High Priest of the Snake
backstory: Arkarium is an ancient and cunning serpent priest who has served the Black Mage since before the sealing. He was responsible for the corruption of the Temple of Time and the manipulation of Rhinne, the Transcendent of Time. A master of poison and dark magic, he orchestrates schemes from the shadows with patience spanning centuries.

name: Von Leon
title: Lion King
backstory: Von Leon was once a noble and beloved king whose wife, Ifia, was killed during the conflict with the Black Mage's forces. Consumed by grief and rage, he blamed the Maple World Alliance and pledged his loyalty to the Black Mage. He was cursed into a monstrous lion form and now guards his castle, forever mourning his lost queen.

name: Damien
title: The Demon Who Defied
backstory: Damien is the younger brother of Demon Slayer who was thought to have perished when the Black Mage destroyed their home. He was secretly taken and corrupted by the Commanders, growing up twisted by resentment and dark power. He eventually sought to absorb the World Tree's power, putting him in direct conflict with his own brother.

name: Lucid
title: Dream Witch of Lachelein
backstory: Lucid was originally a young elf girl named Eurel who idolized Mercedes, the Queen of the Elves. Rejected and lonely, she was lured by the Black Mage's promises and granted power over dreams. She created the nightmare city of Lachelein in Arcane River, trapping souls in eternal sleep to fuel the Black Mage's plans.

name: Will
title: Spider Mage of Esfera
backstory: Will is one of the Black Mage's most cunning and loyal commanders, a spider-themed mage who guards the deepest reaches of Arcane River in Esfera. He orchestrated the imprisonment of Rhinne, the Transcendent of Time, and wove complex webs of manipulation across centuries. His mastery of mirror-world magic makes him a nearly untouchable foe.

name: Verus Hilla
title: True Form of the Shamaness
backstory: Verus Hilla is the true, unleashed form of Hilla who appears during the Moonbridge storyline in Tenebris. Having absorbed immense necromantic power over the centuries, she reveals her full strength as a gatekeeper blocking the path to the Black Mage. In this form, she commands death itself and fights with power rivaling the Transcendents.

name: Orchid
title: Wing Master of the Black Wings
backstory: Orchid is one half of the twin spirits who served as commanders of the Black Mage, leading the Black Wings organization in Edelstein. After her brother Lotus fell into a coma from the battle with the heroes, she dedicated herself to reviving him at any cost. Her love for Lotus ultimately drives her to question her allegiance to the Black Mage.

name: Lotus
title: The Other Wing of the Black Wings
backstory: Lotus is the twin brother of Orchid and co-commander of the Black Wings. He was gravely wounded by Phantom during the battle against the heroes and fell into a deep coma for centuries. His consciousness was later used by the Black Mage to control Gelimer's android bodies, becoming a deadly weapon against his own sister's wishes.

name: Black Mage
title: Transcendent of Light
backstory: The Black Mage, originally a brilliant magician who sought ultimate knowledge, became the Transcendent of Light in Maple World. Disillusioned by the world's inherent flaws, he chose to destroy and remake all of existence, turning his light into absolute darkness. His centuries-long plan to bring about the Genesis culminated in the final battle at Tenebris, the origin of all creation.

name: Rhinne
title: Transcendent of Time
backstory: Rhinne is the Transcendent of Time in Maple World who governs the flow of all temporal events. She was captured and imprisoned by the Black Mage's commander Arkarium, her powers exploited to freeze the Black Mage's seal and manipulate time itself. She created Zero (Alpha and Beta) as vessels to carry her power and one day challenge the Black Mage.

name: Alicia
title: Transcendent of Life
backstory: Alicia is the Transcendent of Life in Maple World, embodied as the World Tree that sustains all living things. Her power was targeted by the Black Mage and his commanders, particularly Damien, who sought to steal the World Tree's energy. Though her physical form was gravely damaged, her spirit endures as the source of life force in Maple World.

name: Darmoor
title: Transcendent of Life (Grandis)
backstory: Darmoor is the Transcendent of Life in the world of Grandis, the Ancient God who seeks to reshape all of existence according to his vision. Unlike the Black Mage who sought destruction, Darmoor desires absolute control over the cycle of life and death. He is the primary antagonist of the Grandis storyline and commands forces that threaten both Grandis and Maple World.

name: Aeona
title: Transcendent of Time (Grandis)
backstory: Aeona is the Transcendent of Time in Grandis, mentioned in ancient texts and prophecies but rarely seen directly. Her role in the balance of Grandis parallels that of Rhinne in Maple World. Little is known about her current state, but her existence is crucial to the cosmic balance between the three Transcendents of Grandis.

name: Empress Cygnus
title: Empress of Ereve
backstory: Cygnus is the young empress of Maple World who rules from the floating island of Ereve with the guidance of Shinsoo, the divine bird. Despite her youth, she leads the Cygnus Knights and the Maple Alliance against the forces of darkness with unwavering courage. She is a descendant of Empress Aria, whose legacy Phantom cherishes.

name: Neinheart
title: Chief Knight of Ereve
backstory: Neinheart is the brilliant chief strategist and advisor to Empress Cygnus, managing the affairs of the Cygnus Knights with meticulous precision. He is known for his sharp intellect, strict demeanor, and unwavering loyalty to the Empress. He coordinates the Maple Alliance's military operations and serves as the primary liaison between all allied forces.

name: Claudine
title: Leader of the Resistance
backstory: Claudine is the leader of the Resistance in Edelstein, a secret organization fighting against the Black Wings' occupation of their city. By day she works as a doctor, but she secretly coordinates the Resistance's guerrilla operations against Orchid's forces. Her courage and tactical mind inspire the citizens of Edelstein to keep fighting for freedom.

name: Alpha
title: Child of the Goddess (Male)
backstory: Alpha is the male half of Zero, created by the Transcendent of Time Rhinne as a vessel for her powers. Trapped in Mirror World with his counterpart Beta, he wields a long sword in combat and can tag-team with Beta seamlessly. Together they seek to escape Mirror World, reclaim Rhinne's power, and challenge the Black Mage's tyranny.

name: Beta
title: Child of the Goddess (Female)
backstory: Beta is the female half of Zero, the other fragment of Rhinne's power created to one day restore the Transcendent of Time. She fights alongside Alpha using a heavy sword, and the two can switch between each other in battle. Their bond transcends simple partnership as they are literally two halves of the same divine power.

name: Gelimer
title: Mad Scientist of Edelstein
backstory: Gelimer is a deranged scientist who serves the Black Wings in Edelstein, conducting twisted experiments on the city's inhabitants. He transformed Lotus's comatose body into a weapon and created deadly androids to enforce the Black Wings' control. His obsession with mechanical perfection and disregard for life make him one of the most despicable figures in Maple World.

name: Francis
title: Puppeteer of the Black Wings
backstory: Francis is a bumbling puppeteer who serves as a low-ranking officer in the Black Wings organization. Despite his loyalty to Orchid and the Black Wings, he is comically incompetent and frequently fails at his missions. He has an obsessive admiration for Orchid and often provides unintentional comic relief in otherwise dark storylines.

name: Eleanor
title: Empress Cygnus's Instructor
backstory: Eleanor served as a trusted magic instructor and advisor in Ereve, the floating island of the Cygnus Knights. However, she harbored dark secrets and was revealed to be working against the Empress in a web of political intrigue. Her betrayal shook the foundations of trust within the Cygnus Knights and the Maple Alliance.

name: Edea
title: Commander of the Nova
backstory: Edea is a brave Nova commander who leads the defense of the Heliseum resistance against Magnus's tyrannical rule in Grandis. She is a skilled warrior and a natural leader who inspires the displaced Nova people to keep fighting for their homeland. Her tactical brilliance and unwavering spirit make her the backbone of the Nova resistance.

name: Athena Pierce
title: Bowman Job Instructor
backstory: Athena Pierce is the Bowman job instructor stationed in Henesys, one of the most recognizable NPCs in all of Maple World. She has guided countless archers on their journey and serves as a wise mentor to adventurers. Her knowledge of the ancient forests and marksmanship is unparalleled among the instructors of Victoria Island.

name: Grendel the Really Old
title: Magician Job Instructor
backstory: Grendel the Really Old is the ancient magician job instructor who resides in the Magic Library of Ellinia. He has lived for centuries and possesses vast knowledge of magic, history, and the secrets of Maple World. Despite his age, his wisdom and magical power make him an invaluable ally in the fight against darkness.

name: Dark Lord
title: Thief Job Instructor
backstory: The Dark Lord is the mysterious thief job instructor who operates from the shadowy back alleys of Kerning City. Shrouded in secrecy, he trains aspiring thieves and assassins while maintaining a vast intelligence network across Maple World. His true identity and past remain enigmatic, but his skills are beyond question.

name: Lily
title: Maple Guide
backstory: Lily is a cheerful fairy who serves as a guide and helper to adventurers navigating the vast world of Maple Story. She provides directions, tips, and encouragement to travelers who find themselves lost or overwhelmed. Her bright personality and dedication to helping others make her a beloved companion throughout Maple World.

name: Checky
title: Event Manager
backstory: Checky is the energetic squirrel NPC who manages events and celebrations throughout Maple World. Always seen wearing festive attire, Checky keeps adventurers informed about seasonal events, special promotions, and limited-time activities. His enthusiasm is infectious and he has become a familiar face in towns across Maple World.

name: Sugar
title: Coordinator
backstory: Sugar is a friendly coordinator NPC who helps adventurers with various tasks and provides reward boxes in Maple World. She can often be found near major towns offering assistance and daily gifts to travelers. Her warm personality and generous nature make her a welcome sight for adventurers of all levels.

name: Maple Administrator
title: World Administrator
backstory: The Maple Administrator is the official NPC who manages system-level announcements, notices, and compensation across Maple World. Appearing as an authoritative figure in a suit, the Administrator handles maintenance notices, event coordination, and player communication. They serve as the bridge between the world's management and its adventurers.

name: Kain
title: Cursed Nova Assassin
backstory: Kain is a Nova from Grandis who was captured and experimented on by the Drakas, Darmoor's soldiers, transforming him into a living weapon infused with malice energy. He escaped his captors but carries the curse of uncontrollable destructive power within him. Now he seeks to master his affliction and use it against those who created him while protecting his fellow Nova.

name: Lara
title: Bell-Wielding Shaman
backstory: Lara is a young Anima girl from the village of Narin in Grandis who possesses the rare ability to hear and communicate with the spirits of nature using her bell. When her homeland was threatened by Darmoor's forces, she set out on a journey to understand her powers and protect the natural world. Her gentle spirit belies a fierce determination to defend those she loves.

name: Adele
title: Knight of the Flora
backstory: Adele is a High Flora knight who served as a loyal guardian of her people before being betrayed and sealed away by those she trusted. Awakening in a changed world, she discovers her former allies have joined Darmoor's forces and her people are divided. She wields ethereal swords created from Aether and fights to restore honor to the Flora's legacy.

name: Illium
title: Crystal Scholar of the Flora
backstory: Illium is a young Flora scholar from the hidden city of Sanctuary who bonded with the ancient Crystal of the Elder, gaining extraordinary magical power. When Darmoor's forces discovered and attacked Sanctuary, Illium became the last hope of the remaining Flora refugees. He fights using crystal magic and his mechanical companion Ex to protect his displaced people.

name: Ark
title: Specter-Cursed High Flora
backstory: Ark is a High Flora soldier who was part of Darmoor's army before a failed experiment infused him with unstable Specter energy, erasing his memories. Rescued by the Anima people, he chose to fight against his former master and the darkness within himself. He struggles to control the Specter power that threatens to consume him while protecting his newfound allies.

name: Hoyoung
title: Mischievous Sage of Cheong-woon
backstory: Hoyoung is a talented but mischievous young sage from Cheong-woon Valley in Grandis who accidentally released a powerful fiend named Taotie from its seal. Taking responsibility for his blunder, he set out on a journey to recapture the scattered fiends using his mastery of Eastern magic and talismans. His playful personality masks genuine skill and a growing sense of duty.

name: Zero
title: Children of the Goddess Rhinne
backstory: Zero is the combined form of Alpha and Beta, twin children created by the Transcendent of Time, Rhinne, to carry her powers and challenge the Black Mage's control over time. Trapped in Mirror World by the Black Mage's commanders, they must work together to break free and reclaim the power of time. Their unique tag-team combat style reflects their nature as two halves of one divine will.

name: Demon Slayer
title: The Demon Who Turned Against the Black Mage
backstory: Demon Slayer was once a powerful commander of the Black Mage who betrayed his master after discovering the Black Mage had destroyed his family and home. He provided critical intelligence to the heroes that enabled the sealing of the Black Mage. After awakening centuries later, he joins the Resistance in Edelstein, driven by vengeance and the hope of finding his brother Damien alive.

name: Demon Avenger
title: Fury of the Demon
backstory: Demon Avenger shares the same origin as Demon Slayer, a former commander who turned against the Black Mage after the destruction of his family. However, instead of sealing away his demonic power, the Demon Avenger fully embraces the darkness within, channeling his life force into devastating attacks. He sacrifices his own vitality to fuel his relentless pursuit of vengeance.

name: Xenon
title: Half-Human Half-Machine
backstory: Xenon was a young boy from Edelstein who was kidnapped by Gelimer and transformed into a cyborg weapon through brutal experimentation. He escaped the Black Wings' laboratory with fragmented memories and a body that is half human, half machine. Taken in by the Resistance, he fights to recover his lost identity while using his hybrid abilities against the organization that created him.

name: Kaiser
title: Guardian Dragon of the Nova
backstory: Kaiser is the inheritor of the legendary dragon warrior power that has been passed down through generations of Nova protectors. When Magnus conquered Heliseum, the previous Kaiser fell in battle, and the power chose a young Nova named Kyle as its next vessel. As the new Kaiser, he transforms into a mighty dragon warrior to liberate his people and reclaim their homeland from Magnus.

name: Angelic Buster
title: Pop Star of Grandis
backstory: Angelic Buster is a young Nova girl named Tear who was born without the dragon tail that defines her race, making her an outcast. She received the power of the ancient relic Eskalade, transforming into a magical girl-style pop star warrior who fights with soul energy. She keeps her identity secret while battling for Heliseum as both Kaiser's childhood friend and a hero in her own right.

name: Cadena
title: Chain-Wielding Street Fighter
backstory: Cadena is a Nova girl named Kalis who survived the fall of Heliseum as an orphan, growing up on the dangerous streets of Savage Terminal in Grandis. She mastered chain weapons and street fighting out of sheer necessity to survive in the lawless underworld. Tough and independent, she eventually joins the fight against Magnus to avenge her lost home and people.
